items.title: Inside Gucci's Generation Gucci Event in Manila
items.summary: L'Officiel Philippines covers Gucci's Generation Gucci event in Manila, where Filipino celebrities Pia Wurtzbach-Jauncey, Brent Manalo, Kylie Verzosa, Michelle Dee, BJ Pascual and Anthony Constantino wore looks from Demna's first Gucci Pre-Fall collection. Framed as a local brand activation extending the creative reset into the Philippine market; positive/PR-leaning coverage.

items.title: PurseForum Thread: "Gucci's Quality Issue"
items.summary: Long-running international handbag-collector forum thread (used by SEA-based collectors alongside other regions) cataloguing complaints about paint chipping on GG hardware, uneven stitching, and leather durability issues recurring even after repair. Undated ongoing thread; included per anti-bias critical-angle mandate given a genuine scarcity of dated fresh negative SEA-origin content this cycle.
